case_title: RADWA MOUSTAFA VS. FERID BEN TOUNSI

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOUSTAFA, RADWA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO FERID BEN TOUNSI BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-09-2012 AT 1:30 PM.. DEFENDANT FERID BEN TOUNSI DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2012 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOUSTAFA, RADWA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BETTER PROPERTY MANAGMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOUSTAFA, RADWA AS TO DEFENDANT TOUNSI, FERID BEN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) /AUTH TO APPEAR FILED BY DEFENDANT BETTER PROPERTY MANAGMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-21-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TOUNSI, FERID BEN
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOUSTAFA, RADWA AS TO DEFENDANT BETTER PROPERTY MANAGMENT
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL - GRANTED - JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL -
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT BETTER PROPERTY MANAGMENT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2012 - CONTINUED TO OCT-09-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM SENT TO FERID BEN TOUNSI - UNABLE TO FORWARD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-09-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-09-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. STEVEN BROWN APPEARS ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT BETTER PROPERTY MGMT. MR. BROWN WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT FERID TOUNSI. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
